CitationReferenceCaptionFormat.description: Caption format of the citation reference, either as a number (SCI_CITEREF_NUM) or the annotated key (SCI_CITEREF_KEY).

ShowTooltipForCitationReference.description: Citation reference formats (SCI_CITEREF_NUM, SCI_CITEREF_KEY) for which a tooltip is enabled.

TooltipRequestCacheTTLInSeconds.description: Expiry for a citation text that is locally cached in a browser before a new ajax-request is made; false to disable the cache.

MetadataResponseCacheType.description: Cache type used to cache responses received from a metadata provider (-1 is CACHE_ANYTHING).

MetadataResponseCacheLifetime.description: Lifetime in seconds of a cached metadata provider response.

NumberOfReferenceListColumns.description: Number of columns displayed for the reference list (0 enables responsive columns).

ResponsiveMonoColumnCharacterBoundLength.description: Limits responsive columns to a mono list when the character length of the produced reference list is lower than this value.

BrowseLinkToCitationResource.description: Whether to generate a "Browse" link to a citation resource.

ReferenceListCacheType.description: Cache type used for the reference list (-1 is CACHE_ANYTHING, CACHE_NONE disables caching).

EnabledStrictParserValidation.description: Whether a strict validation on behalf of the #scite parser is enabled.

EnabledCitationTextChangeUpdateJob.description: Whether an update job is dispatched for changed citation text entities.
